{{CargoOrgan
|name=Snyberpunk Implant
|type=Common
|rank=blue
|id=10938
|idx=34
|description=An advanced neural interface that convinces your brain time moves slower by overclocking your perception. Basically legalized bullet-time cheating.
|skill=
|hp=1210
|def=120
|atk=106
|rush=71
|gene1=In Mecha Form, Chance to trigger Stonehide +2%
|gene2=Against Daily Hitmen, DMG +3%
|gene3=Against Daily Hitmen, DMG REDUC +2%
|gene7=Against Daily Hitmen, DMG +3% (Awakened)
|}}
